title: Prepositions — Advanced
topics: prepositions of time · place · movement · dependent prepositions
description: Pokročilé předložky — časté chyby Čechů a závislé předložky po slovesech.

vocabulary.cz: at 3 o'clock / at midnight / at Christmas
on Monday / on 5th May / on my birthday
in January / in 2024 / in the morning
až do (průběhu): I worked until midnight
od (s perfect): I've lived here since 2010
po dobu: I've lived here for 10 years

notes: ⚠️  by vs until: 'Finish BY Friday' (deadline) vs 'Work UNTIL Friday' (duration)
⚠️  despite + noun/-ing: 'Despite the rain' / 'Despite feeling tired'
✓ interested IN, good AT, afraid OF, responsible FOR, dependent ON
✓ differ FROM, result IN, consist OF, lead TO, apply FOR
✓ at the end (specific) vs in the end (finally, after everything)

examples.en: The meeting was cancelled due to bad weather.
examples.cz: Schůzka byla zrušena kvůli špatnému počasí.

examples.en: I'll have the report ready by Thursday.
examples.cz: Zprávu budu mít připravenou do čtvrtka.

examples.en: She's been working here since she graduated.
examples.cz: Pracuje zde od doby, co promovala.

examples.en: Regardless of the outcome, we gave our best.
examples.cz: Bez ohledu na výsledek jsme podali nejlepší výkon.

quiz.sentence: He's been learning English ___ five years.

tasks: 1. Write 5 sentences about your week using: by, until, since, for, within
3. Find 10 dependent prepositions (verb/adj + prep) not listed above — learn them
